evals.name: lumie-project-status-zh
evals.prompt: 把这个 Markdown 文件转成一个独立的、风格化的 HTML 网页。文字一字不能改，但视觉上要看起来像精心设计过的项目主页。保存到 C:\Users\Midas\Desktop\MD_HTML\md-to-styled-html-workspace\iteration-1\eval-0-lumie-project-status-zh\<config>\outputs\output.html，其中 <config> 是 with_skill 或 without_skill。
tests: Every visible character from the source MD appears in the rendered HTML (no paraphrasing, no shortening)
Output is a single self-contained HTML file; only external resource is Google Fonts via <link>
Typography choice avoids generic AI defaults (no Inter/Roboto/Arial/system-ui as the only font)
Color palette is intentional (not just black on white), with deliberate accent color
Tables render with proper styling, not raw <table> defaults
Aesthetic direction matches content tone (technical project status — should feel structured and confident, not whimsical)
Chinese characters render with an appropriate CJK font (not browser default fallback)

evals.name: personal-essay-zh
evals.prompt: 把这个 Markdown 散文转成一个独立的、风格化的 HTML 网页。文字一字不能改。视觉上要match这种文学性、温度感的内容调性。保存到 C:\Users\Midas\Desktop\MD_HTML\md-to-styled-html-workspace\iteration-1\eval-1-personal-essay-zh\<config>\outputs\output.html，其中 <config> 是 with_skill 或 without_skill。
tests: Every word from the source MD appears verbatim in the HTML
Output is single self-contained HTML; only external resource is Google Fonts
Aesthetic direction matches literary/editorial content (serif typography preferred, generous whitespace, narrow column)
Chinese serif or warm display font is used (e.g., Noto Serif SC, LXGW WenKai), not default sans
Blockquotes are styled distinctively (not just default browser indent)
Color palette is muted and contemplative, not bright marketing energy
Avoids landing-page tropes (no feature grids, no CTAs, no hero buttons)

evals.name: product-launch-en
evals.prompt: Convert this Markdown README into a single self-contained, beautifully styled HTML page. Preserve every word of the source text verbatim. The visual style should match the content's tone — this is a developer-tool product launch and should feel polished and confident, like a real product landing page. Save to C:\Users\Midas\Desktop\MD_HTML\md-to-styled-html-workspace\iteration-1\eval-2-product-launch-en\<config>\outputs\output.html where <config> is either with_skill or without_skill.
tests: Every word from the source MD appears verbatim in the HTML
Output is single self-contained HTML; only external resource is Google Fonts
Distinctive typography (not Inter/Roboto/Arial)
Aesthetic feels like a real product landing page (hero, deliberate hierarchy, confident visual identity)
Code blocks are styled tastefully (monospace, dark or distinct background, NOT browser default)
Comparison table has visual polish (alternating rows or thoughtful borders, not raw <table>)
Avoids generic AI-slop aesthetics (no purple-on-white gradient hero, no centered-card-stack)
